example.value: Apak pek jadi kibeli seluar pai madei iduit keknep jengwal betar ya dij kibeli cengroi ru arap caknak.

translation.value: Ayah tidak jadi membeli seluar baru kerana duit hasil menjual petai sudah habis kerana membeli beras dan barang makanan.
Father did not buy new trousers because the money from selling petai harvest had already run out owing to the fact that he had bought rice and food stuffs.

example.value: Bob tatabahase ajeh bisusut ya ahli bahase.

translation.value: Buku mengenai tatabahasa itu disusun oleh ahli bahasa.

example.value: Dewan ajeh it ya sengoi naiha-daftar undi.

translation.value: Dewan itu sesak oleh orang yang mahu mendaftar undi.

definitionorgloss.value: daytime from 11 a.m. until 3 p.m.; early afternoon

example.value: Wak Lia ajeh pakot, iyahnah pen kisengoh kaha-et deg mahnuh.

translation.value: Wak Lia itu penakut, (waktu masih) siang (tapi) dia takut mahu ke bilik air.
Wak Lia is a coward, even in the daytime she is afraid to go to the bathroom.

example.value: Hamapen ya nik yahnah amek kitil bak, tapi lekat pek sot juga medei iarik selalo leop.

translation.value: Walaupun sudah tiga hari ibu menjemur padi, tetapi masih juga tidak kering kerana cuaca selalunya mendung.
Even though it is already three days since mother put the paddy outside to dry under the sun, but it is not dry yet, because the weather has been overcast.

definitionorgloss.value: to be confident; to be certain; to be convincing

example.value: Wak Nani pek kiyaken buleh kilulos ujian lesen memandu medei ilei betol-betol kikerog mase kek biuji.

translation.value: Wak Nani tidak yakin boleh lulus ujian (bagi) lesen memandu kerana dia betul-betul cemas semasa dia diuji.
Wak Nani is not confident that she has passed the driving test because she was really nervous when she was tested.

example.value: Yok Kerel kiurok, "Puseg nu yal. Depan ajeh deg eng."

example.value: Kek kiyal, belok nanek kek kaha-pileh madei semua ajeh bor kineng.

translation.value: Dia dipenuhi perasaan keliru dia tidak tahu yang mana satu harus dia pilih kerana semua yang dia lihat itu sungguh menarik.
She was overwhelmed with confusion and did not know which one she should choose because all that she saw were pleasing.

definitionorgloss.value: to be immersed; to be engrossed

example.value: Wak Intan kiyal brencet ku deg wal lei mai betiba nu imadeg pek kisedar.

translation.value: Wak Intan khusyuk memasak di dapur sehingga tidak menyedari ada orang datang ke rumahnya.
Wak Intan is engrossed in cooking in the kitchen and does not realize there are people coming to her house.

definitionorgloss.value: kasihan; perasaan dukacita atau tidak gembira terhadap penderitaan dan kesengsaraan orang lain
pity; sympathy; sadness for the suffering and misery of others

example.value: Apak eng kiurok ha Wak Bekau, "Yayak sanget ajeh, isinui rekneg telas ikeneng menek dat ya eksiden."

translation.value: Bapa saya berkata mengenai Wak Bekau, "Kasihan budak itu, dia menjadi yatim piatu setelah kedua ibu bapanya meninggal dunia akibat kemalangan."
"It is pity for the girl, she is orphan after both of her parents died in an accident," my father mentioned about Wak Bekau,

definitionorgloss.value: mengejutkan; membuatkan seseorang sedar dari tidurnya

example.value: Apak kior eng yel menang-ng, medei ijam ya kaha-merek pukol 6 pegelat, kaha-et nu sekulah tapi pekseg kikos nij.

translation.value: Ayah menyuruh saya mengejutkan adik dari tidur kerana waktu menunjukkan hampir pukul 6 pagi untuk pergi ke sekolah, tetapi dia belum bangun lagi.

example.value: Tenek eng kiurok nu Bah Jali, "Yoj pahat kek pai ngbeli adeh mahal iregak. Maap eng pek buleh ngog pinyap lagi nu bok-bok pen."

translation.value: Abang saya berkata kepada Bah Jali, "Pisau toreh yang saya baru beli ini mahal harganya. Maaf saya tidak boleh memberi pinjam kepada sesiapa pun lagi."
"This rubber tapping knife that I just bought is expensive. Sorry I cannot lend it to anybody. yet," said my older brother to Bah Jali.

example.value: Eng ngyos ku Hospital Gombak, Selangor.

translation.value: Saya lahir di Hospital Gombak, Selangor.
I was born at Gombak Hospital, Selangor.

example-2.value: "Amek, mong kuceg kiperikyos ku kerop katel eng!" Bah Jali kicereg iamek.

translation-2.value: "Ibu, terdapat kucing melahirkan di bawah katil saya!" Bah Jali memanggil ibunya.
"Mom, there's a cat giving birth under my bed!" Bah Jali called his mother.

example-2.value: Wak Sali kiperyos kenon kerbar, rimar ikenon ajeh kerdor.

translation-2.value: Wak Sali melahirkan anak kembar dimana kedua-dua anaknya tersebut adalah perempuan.
Wak Sali gave birth to twins girls.

example-2.value: Bah Amat bisamut iyisnos ku Teluk Batik, bibeh caknak ku beg pentei ya iperingak.

translation-2.value: Hari kelahiran Bah Amat disambut di Teluk Batik, keluarganya membuat jamuan makan di tepi pantai.
Bah Amat's birthday was celebrated at the Teluk Batik, and his family had a feast near the beach there.

displayXhtml: yoskata kerjalahir; keluar dari kandungan ibu yang mengandungto be bornEng ngyos ku Hospital Gombak, Selangor.Saya lahir di Hospital Gombak, Selangor.I was born at Gombak Hospital, Selangor.perikyoskata kerjamelahirkanto give birth"Amek, mong kuceg kiperikyos ku kerop katel eng!" Bah Jali kicereg iamek."Ibu, terdapat kucing melahirkan di bawah katil saya!" Bah Jali memanggil ibunya."Mom, there's a cat giving birth under my bed!" Bah Jali called his mother.peryoskata kerjamelahirkanto give birthWak Sali kiperyos kenon kerbar, rimar ikenon ajeh kerdor.Wak Sali melahirkan anak kembar dimana kedua-dua anaknya tersebut adalah perempuan.Wak Sali gave birth to twins girls.yisnoskata namakelahiranbirthBah Amat bisamut iyisnos ku Teluk Batik, bibeh caknak ku beg pentei ya iperingak.Hari kelahiran Bah Amat disambut di Teluk Batik, keluarganya membuat jamuan makan di tepi pantai.Bah Amat's birthday was celebrated at the Teluk Batik, and his family had a feast near the beach there.
searchTexts: lahir; keluar dari kandungan ibu yang mengandung
Eng ngyos ku Hospital Gombak, Selangor.
Saya lahir di Hospital Gombak, Selangor.
I was born at Gombak Hospital, Selangor.
"Amek, mong kuceg kiperikyos ku kerop katel eng!" Bah Jali kicereg iamek.
"Ibu, terdapat kucing melahirkan di bawah katil saya!" Bah Jali memanggil ibunya.
"Mom, there's a cat giving birth under my bed!" Bah Jali called his mother.
Wak Sali kiperyos kenon kerbar, rimar ikenon ajeh kerdor.
Wak Sali melahirkan anak kembar dimana kedua-dua anaknya tersebut adalah perempuan.
Wak Sali gave birth to twins girls.
Bah Amat bisamut iyisnos ku Teluk Batik, bibeh caknak ku beg pentei ya iperingak.
Hari kelahiran Bah Amat disambut di Teluk Batik, keluarganya membuat jamuan makan di tepi pantai.
Bah Amat's birthday was celebrated at the Teluk Batik, and his family had a feast near the beach there.

sea: Eng ngyos ku Hospital Gombak, Selangor.
"Amek, mong kuceg kiperikyos ku kerop katel eng!" Bah Jali kicereg iamek.
Wak Sali kiperyos kenon kerbar, rimar ikenon ajeh kerdor.
Bah Amat bisamut iyisnos ku Teluk Batik, bibeh caknak ku beg pentei ya iperingak.
ms: lahir; keluar dari kandungan ibu yang mengandung
Saya lahir di Hospital Gombak, Selangor.
"Ibu, terdapat kucing melahirkan di bawah katil saya!" Bah Jali memanggil ibunya.
Wak Sali melahirkan anak kembar dimana kedua-dua anaknya tersebut adalah perempuan.
Hari kelahiran Bah Amat disambut di Teluk Batik, keluarganya membuat jamuan makan di tepi pantai.
en: to be born
I was born at Gombak Hospital, Selangor.
to give birth
"Mom, there's a cat giving birth under my bed!" Bah Jali called his mother.
Wak Sali gave birth to twins girls.
birth

example.value: Bah Deli kibegaye ru yunipom de pai kibelik.

translation.value: Bah Deli bergaya dengan pakaian seragam yang baru dibeli.
Bah Deli looks stylish in his newly-purchased uniform.
